deck_name: Oracle at the Edge of the Known World

cards.title: The First Noticing
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Attention is where devotion takes root.
easy.title: The Cutting Lens of Argyra

medium.line: Where attention rests, devotion begins to grow
medium.title: The Silent Measure of Argyra

hard.line: Attention turns the ordinary into something held.
hard.title: The Final Edge of Argyra

prompts.easy: Name one thing you noticed about me this week.
prompts.medium: Tell me one thing I do that you've never said out loud.
prompts.hard: What have you been noticing about me that you've been afraid to name?

cards.title: The Sharpening
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: A single life burns with the question of its use.
easy.title: The Breaking Stillness of Meridia

medium.line: A wild and precious life demands a chosen direction.
medium.title: The Steady Hand of Meridia

hard.line: Life eagerly waits for the shape it will be given.
hard.title: The Rising Bloom of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's one thing about me you see clearly that you haven't said directly?
prompts.medium: Tell me one thing you've been seeing clearly about me that you've been softening when you say it out loud.
prompts.hard: What's the sharpest true thing you could say about who I am right now — the version you'd only say if you knew I could take it?

cards.title: The Long Pause
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: The moment stands just beyond the call.
easy.title: The Tending Hand of Virelune

medium.line: Waiting holds the breath before the name is spoken.
medium.title: The Rooted Light of Virelune

hard.line: A turn approaches through the stillness of waiting.
hard.title: The Revealing Vine of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's present between us right now that you haven't fully let yourself feel?
prompts.medium: What are you rushing past in this friendship that deserves more of your attention?
prompts.hard: What would change between us if you slowed down enough to actually feel what's here?

cards.title: The After
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: No great Mystery has a final answer.
easy.title: The Quiet Bloom of Virelune

prompts.easy: Name one thing that's different between us now compared to when we first became friends.
prompts.medium: Tell me what you understand about me now that you couldn't have known a year ago.
prompts.hard: What has changed in how you see me — and have you ever said it out loud?

cards.title: The Temperature Check
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Resignation has not found a home here.
easy.title: The Quiet Calibrator of Argyra

medium.line: Something in this refuses to bow.
medium.title: The Quiet Pressure of Argyra

prompts.easy: What's your energy like right now, in one word?
prompts.medium: Tell me what's running underneath your surface today.
prompts.hard: What feeling about Casey are you carrying right now that you haven't named out loud yet?

cards.title: The Texture Card
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Every form breaks somewhere; light enters there.
easy.title: The Iron Ward of Argyra

medium.line: Light finds the fracture and makes it a doorway.
medium.title: The Unmoving Edge of Argyra

hard.line: What breaks open becomes a passage for light.
hard.title: The Blazing Oath of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What feels unresolved or unsettled between us right now — it doesn't have to be bad, just unfinished?
prompts.medium: What's a moment between us you moved past too quickly?
prompts.hard: Tell me what you were actually feeling the last time you told me you were fine.

cards.title: The Unsaid Thing
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Unspoken words settle into the body.
easy.title: The Breaking Flame of Pyrakanth

medium.line: Silence gathers what the voice refuses.
medium.title: The Truth Seer of Pyrakanth

hard.line: What goes unsaid takes shape within.
hard.title: The Held Flame of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What's one thing you almost said to me but didn't?
prompts.medium: Tell me something you've been holding back that has nothing to do with a problem.
prompts.hard: What truth have you been protecting me from that I might actually need?

cards.title: The Peripheral Vision
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Life withers while the heart stands elsewhere.
easy.title: The Ember Diver of Pyrakanth

medium.line: Time can pass without ever touching what matters.
medium.title: The Whispering Spark of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What do you sense Casey needs right now that they haven't asked for?
prompts.medium: What have you been noticing about yourself lately that's been harder to look at?
prompts.hard: What are you aware of — about yourself, about us — that you've been deliberately not looking at?

cards.title: The Arrival
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: The ordinary waits for the gaze that makes it sacred.
easy.title: The Ashen Voice of Pyrakanth

medium.line: Everything leans toward holiness when seen clearly.
medium.title: The Open Tide of Lamenth

hard.line: The sacred waits inside what is overlooked.
hard.title: The Sorrow Mirror of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What does it feel like to be around me?
prompts.medium: When did you last feel like you'd actually arrived — like you were fully present with me?
prompts.hard: Tell me what it feels like when you stop performing.

cards.title: The Witnessing
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: The watcher sits quietly inside every moment.
easy.title: The Lingering Echo of Lamenth

medium.line: The self never stops bearing witness.
medium.title: The Gentle Current of Lamenth

hard.line: Every act unfolds under an inward gaze.
hard.title: The Quiet Basin of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What are you watching in yourself right now?
prompts.medium: What are you watching in yourself when you're with me — and do you like what you see?
prompts.hard: What are you witnessing in yourself right now that you haven't been willing to say to me?

cards.title: The Quality of Attention
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Attention opens into astonishment and asks for a mouthpiece.
easy.title: The Deep Shelter of Lamenth

medium.line: What is seen deeply seeks to be spoken.
medium.title: The Drowned Path of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What's something small that astonished you recently?
prompts.medium: Tell me one moment this week when you felt fully alive.
prompts.hard: What are you not paying attention to that wants your attention?

cards.title: The Echo
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Worth stands before goodness is measured.
easy.title: The Quiet Ground of Meridia

medium.line: Belonging does not wait for perfection.
medium.title: The Living Wall of Meridia

hard.line: Being arrives before any standard is met.
hard.title: The Open Field of Meridia

prompts.easy: What does it take out of you to show up honestly with me?
prompts.medium: What do you notice yourself holding back in order to keep things comfortable between us?
prompts.hard: What's the price you're paying right now to stay in this friendship the way you've been showing up in it?

cards.title: The Drift
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure seated and thinking, the other leaning in to listen.

easy.line: Every path is shared
easy.title: The Plain Speaker of Meridia

medium.line: Each life moves in quiet company with another.
medium.title: The Weight Bearer of Meridia

hard.line: The journey home is never solitary.
hard.title: The Gentle Shift of Meridia

prompts.easy: How connected do you feel to me right now?
prompts.medium: Tell me what shifts in you when you're around me versus other people.
prompts.hard: What's the distance between us right now that neither of us has named?

cards.title: The Small Honesty
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Cowardice lasts longer than fear.
easy.title: The Soft Canopy of Virelune

medium.line: A coward lives with the cost; the brave meet it once.
medium.title: The Cutting Lens of Argyra

hard.line: Fear flows. Cowardice pools.
hard.title: The Silent Measure of Argyra

prompts.easy: Name one thing you've let slide in our friendship.
prompts.medium: Tell me one way you've been showing up in this friendship that you're not proud of.
prompts.hard: What's the pattern you keep bringing to close friendships that you wish you could stop?

cards.title: The Confession Dial
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Grief without passion has already gone silent.
easy.title: The Gentle Shift of Meridia

medium.line: Grief must move to remain alive in the heart.
medium.title: The Steady Hand of Meridia

prompts.easy: Name one thing you've been less than fully honest with me about.
prompts.medium: Tell me something you said to me that was true but not the whole truth.
prompts.hard: What's the thing you've been most careful not to say directly — and what would happen if you just said it?

cards.title: The Tide
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Storms teach the captain how to sail the ship.
easy.title: The Rising Bloom of Virelune

medium.line: Every storm answers to the hand that dares to steer.
medium.title: The Tending Hand of Virelune

hard.line: The heart learns the sea by staying with the storm.
hard.title: The Rooted Light of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's one thing between us that you let pass in the moment but it stayed with you?
prompts.medium: Tell me about something you let build up that you wish you'd said earlier.
prompts.hard: What's the version of an apology you owe me that you haven't fully given yet?

cards.title: The Reckoning
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Everything changes; nothing is lost to the whole.
easy.title: The Revealing Vine of Virelune

medium.line: Nothing ends; every form becomes another.
medium.title: The Wild Current of Virelune

hard.line: All things shift
hard.title: The Hidden Bloom of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's one thing about how you show up in friendships that you've had to face honestly?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a version of yourself in friendship that you've had to leave behind.
prompts.hard: What's the most honest account you can give of who you've been in this friendship — and who you want to be going forward?

cards.title: The Projection
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Every dragon answers to the same call as the hero.
easy.title: The Final Edge of Argyra

medium.line: The hero and the dragon share a single fire.
medium.title: The Quiet Calibrator of Argyra

prompts.easy: What's something in me that sometimes bothers you that you also see in yourself?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a time you judged me for something you were also doing.
prompts.hard: What do you resent in me that belongs to you?

cards.title: The Ask Card
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Speak the want without disguise.
easy.title: The Unyielding Vector of Argyra

medium.line: Name the want or lose the chance.
medium.title: The Iron Ward of Argyra

hard.line: Let the want be heard before silence claims it.
hard.title: The Unmoving Edge of Argyra

prompts.easy: What's something small you've wanted from me that you talked yourself out of asking for?
prompts.medium: What do you make yourself need less of because you're afraid to ask for it?
prompts.hard: What's the thing you most want from this friendship that you've never let yourself ask for — and what does that cost you?

cards.title: The Withhold
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: The truth resists purity and refuses simplicity.
easy.title: The Blazing Oath of Pyrakanth

medium.line: The truth comes tangled and cuts anyway.
medium.title: The Breaking Flame of Pyrakanth

hard.line: Truth is a Chimaera.
hard.title: The Truth Seer of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What's something true about our friendship you've been keeping to yourself?
prompts.medium: Tell me a small resentment you've been sitting on.
prompts.hard: What have you been pretending is fine that actually isn't?

cards.title: The Pattern
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: The master of fate answers to no one but the self.
easy.title: The Held Flame of Pyrakanth

medium.line: The soul follows the hand that dares to guide it.
medium.title: The Whispering Spark of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What's a habit of yours that probably affects the people close to you?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a pattern you've noticed yourself repeating in friendships.
prompts.hard: What are you doing in this friendship that you've done before and it cost you?

cards.title: The Repair
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Great pain settles into a formal stillness.
easy.title: The Burning Oath of Pyrakanth

medium.line: After the wound, the body learns a colder shape.
medium.title: The Ashen Voice of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: Is there something between us you walked past at the time that's stayed with you since?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a moment in our friendship where you were more yourself than you let on.
prompts.hard: Tell me about something you did — or didn't do — that you haven't fully made right.

cards.title: The Gift Back
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: Every gift returns to the giver in another form.
easy.title: The Sorrow Mirror of Lamenth

medium.line: Every offering circles back through the same fire.
medium.title: The Lingering Echo of Lamenth

hard.line: What the heart gives, the heart must also receive.
hard.title: The Gentle Current of Lamenth

prompts.easy: Name one thing Casey does for you that you've never acknowledged.
prompts.medium: Tell Casey about a way they show up for you that you've been taking for granted.
prompts.hard: What has Casey given you that you haven't given back — and what would changing that look like?

cards.title: The Shadow
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: No light redeems a darkness left unseen.
easy.title: The Quiet Basin of Lamenth

medium.line: The heart softens when the darkness is allowed to be known.
medium.title: The Returning Tide of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What's a version of yourself you don't show in friendships?
prompts.medium: Tell me about the part of you that comes out when you're not trying to be likeable.
prompts.hard: What's the most difficult version of yourself to be around — and when does it show up?

cards.title: The Cost
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: True affection gathers its own tribe.
easy.title: The Drowned Path of Lamenth

medium.line: Love names the circle and calls it home.
medium.title: The Quiet Ground of Meridia

hard.line: The heart builds its people from what it cannot leave.
hard.title: The Living Wall of Meridia

prompts.easy: What does it cost you to stay close to people?
prompts.medium: Tell me what you give in friendships that drains you.
prompts.hard: What's the price you pay for being the person people can count on?

cards.title: The Receiving
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure speaks with an open palm, sharing something small. The other listens softly.

easy.line: The burden weighs heavy; the soul remains beyond measure.
easy.title: The Open Field of Meridia

medium.line: Weight belongs to the load, not to the one who bears it.
medium.title: The Plain Speaker of Meridia

hard.line: The heart carries much and is never reduced by the carrying.
hard.title: The Weight Bearer of Meridia

prompts.easy: What has Casey been giving you that you haven't fully let in?
prompts.medium: Name the last time Casey gave you something and you didn't fully receive it — then say what you'd receive now.
prompts.hard: What do you need to let go of so you can actually show up for Casey without it being about you?

cards.title: The Stage
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: Everything learned was taken from somewhere that mattered.
easy.title: The Quiet Bloom of Virelune

medium.line: Inspiration burns where something already caught fire.
medium.title: The Soft Canopy of Virelune

hard.line: What resonates becomes part of what grows.
hard.title: The Cutting Lens of Argyra

prompts.easy: What's one thing you understand now that you couldn't have at 22?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a belief you held about friendship that you've had to revise.
prompts.hard: What capacity do you wish you had developed earlier — and what would it have cost you to have it sooner?

cards.title: The Unguarded Moment
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: Love removes the mask the self depends on for protection.
easy.title: The Weight Bearer of Meridia

prompts.easy: Tell me something about yourself you don't usually lead with.
prompts.medium: Share something you're in the middle of figuring out that you haven't packaged into a clean story yet.
prompts.hard: What's the version of yourself you most protect me from seeing — and what would it mean to let me see it?

cards.title: The Longer Arc
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: The self not lived still waits within reach.
easy.title: The Steady Hand of Meridia

medium.line: The heart can still grow toward what it once imagined.
medium.title: The Tending Hand of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's one way you've changed your mind about what good friendship looks like?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a version of yourself you gave up on that you're starting to reconsider.
prompts.hard: What do you want to grow into in the next few years that you haven't told anyone yet?

cards.title: The Integration
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: The end returns the beginning with deeper sight.
easy.title: The Rooted Light of Virelune

medium.line: The path brings the heart back to what it already knew.
medium.title: The Wild Current of Virelune

prompts.easy: What's one thing you know now about yourself in friendships that you wish you'd known at the start of ours?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a hard season you went through and what it made possible that wouldn't have been otherwise.
prompts.hard: What's the through-line of who you've been across all your closest friendships — and what do you make of it?

cards.title: The Reframe
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: The mask shapes the one who wears it.
easy.title: The Silent Measure of Argyra

medium.line: Every role becomes real with enough repetition.
medium.title: The Final Edge of Argyra

hard.line: The self forms around what the heart keeps performing.
hard.title: The Quiet Calibrator of Argyra

prompts.easy: What's a story you've told about a friendship that might not be the whole story?
prompts.medium: Tell me a version of a conflict where the other person wasn't wrong.
prompts.hard: What's a narrative about yourself in relationships that you suspect is a protective story?

cards.title: The Impact
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: A space stands between what happens and what follows.
easy.title: The Quiet Pressure of Argyra

medium.line: The moment before action decides the path.
medium.title: The Unyielding Vector of Argyra

hard.line: The heart lives in the space before answers.
hard.title: The Iron Ward of Argyra

prompts.easy: Ask me one question you've been curious about but haven't felt ready to ask.
prompts.medium: Ask me something about myself that you think would help you understand me better.
prompts.hard: Ask me the question about our friendship that you most need the answer to but have been avoiding.

cards.title: The Capacity
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: Grief and fear share the same breath.
easy.title: The Unmoving Edge of Argyra

medium.line: Fear wears grief when the loss has not settled.
medium.title: The Blazing Oath of Pyrakanth

hard.line: Grief borrows the shape of fear when it first arrives.
hard.title: The Breaking Flame of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What emotional capacity are you still developing?
prompts.medium: Tell me about something you couldn't tolerate two years ago that you can sit with now.
prompts.hard: What are you being asked to grow into right now that scares you?

cards.title: The Other Side
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: An untold story weighs heavier than any burden.
easy.title: The Truth Seer of Pyrakanth

medium.line: Silence traps the story and turns it inward.
medium.title: The Held Flame of Pyrakanth

hard.line: A story kept inside becomes its own kind of fire.
hard.title: The Ember Diver of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: What might someone else's version of a hard moment between you look like?
prompts.medium: Tell me what you think it's like to be on the receiving end of you when you're stressed.
prompts.hard: What does the person who loves you most probably wish you understood about yourself?

cards.title: The Inherited Pattern
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: The beginning holds; the ending bends to the hand.
easy.title: The Whispering Spark of Pyrakanth

medium.line: No return to the start—only a different end earned forward.
medium.title: The Burning Oath of Pyrakanth

hard.line: The path behind questions; the path ahead still answers.
hard.title: The Ashen Voice of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: Where do you see your upbringing showing up in how you do friendship?
prompts.medium: Tell me about a relational pattern you inherited that you're actively trying to change.
prompts.hard: What did the adults in your life model about receiving care that you're still unlearning?

cards.title: The Permission
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: A masterpiece carries the mark of what is unfinished.
easy.title: The Open Tide of Lamenth

medium.line: Becoming burns inside what already stands complete.
medium.title: The Sorrow Mirror of Lamenth

hard.line: The heart holds the finished and the forming together.
hard.title: The Lingering Echo of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What are you giving yourself permission to not be good at right now?
prompts.medium: Tell me something you're in the middle of learning that you haven't announced yet.
prompts.hard: What would change if you stopped waiting to have it figured out before you showed up?

cards.title: The Blind Spot
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: The world reflects the one who looks.
easy.title: The Gentle Current of Lamenth

medium.line: Vision carries the shape of the seer.
medium.title: The Quiet Basin of Lamenth

hard.line: The world meets the heart as the heart arrives.
hard.title: The Deep Shelter of Lamenth

prompts.easy: What kind of friend do you think you're capable of being that you haven't fully been yet?
prompts.medium: What would it look like for you to be fully present in this friendship — not someday, but as a real possibility?
prompts.hard: What's the deepest version of yourself in friendship that you can almost see but haven't stepped into?

cards.title: The Threshold
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: Wandering follows a path not yet named.
easy.title: The Returning Tide of Lamenth

medium.line: A path exists even without a destination declared.
medium.title: The Drowned Path of Lamenth

hard.line: The heart can move without losing its ground.
hard.title: The Quiet Ground of Meridia

prompts.easy: What threshold are you standing at right now?
prompts.medium: Tell me about something in your life that is ending, even if it hasn't officially ended.
prompts.hard: What are you afraid of becoming — and what are you afraid you already are?

cards.title: The Long View
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. One figure shares openly with both hands, the other leans forward in deep listening.

easy.line: Exploration returns the beginning altered by knowing.
easy.title: The Living Wall of Meridia

medium.line: Every journey circles through fire and returns changed.
medium.title: The Open Field of Meridia

hard.line: The path returns the heart to what it could not first see.
hard.title: The Plain Speaker of Meridia

prompts.easy: What do you want your close friendships to feel like in ten years?
prompts.medium: Tell me what you're building in yourself that your future self will thank you for.
prompts.hard: What would the person you're becoming need from this friendship that you haven't asked for yet?

cards.title: The First Move
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Presence stand guard while Love struggles through the night.
easy.title: The Hidden Bloom of Virelune

medium.line: Staying becomes the act that defines love.
medium.title: The Quiet Bloom of Virelune

hard.line: Love does not leave when the night stretches on.
hard.title: The Soft Canopy of Virelune

prompts.easy: Text Casey something you've been meaning to say for a while.
prompts.medium: Send Casey a voice note telling them one specific thing you appreciate about them.
prompts.hard: Reach out to Casey before they reach out to you — and tell them exactly why you did it today.

cards.title: The Risk
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

prompts.easy: Do one thing for Casey this week that's slightly outside your comfort zone.
prompts.medium: Tell Casey something you've wanted to offer this friendship but have been talking yourself out of — and then offer it.
prompts.hard: Do the thing for Casey that feels most exposing to offer — and do it this week.

cards.title: The Open Door
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: The wound opens the way for light.
easy.title: The Breaking Stillness of Meridia

prompts.easy: Tell Casey one way they could make it easier for you to reach out when you need something — today.
prompts.medium: Do one thing this week that makes it easier for Casey to reach you — not by asking them what they need, but by offering something before they have to.
prompts.hard: Remove one barrier between you and Casey that's been making it harder to show up — and do it this week.

cards.title: The Witness
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: The way forward remains inside what stands before it.
easy.title: The Tending Hand of Virelune

prompts.easy: Tell Casey one thing you've witnessed in them recently that you haven't named out loud — today.
prompts.medium: Name something you've watched Casey carry without complaint — and do something about it this week.
prompts.hard: Do something for Casey this week that shows you've been paying attention — something only possible because you actually see them.

cards.title: The Proactive
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: The vow forms long before it is spoken.
easy.title: The Silent Measure of Argyra

medium.line: The heart binds itself before witnesses arrive.
medium.title: The Final Edge of Argyra

prompts.easy: Think of something Casey does for others that you've never done for them — and do it this week.
prompts.medium: Do something for Casey this week that you'd want someone to do for you.
prompts.hard: Do the thing for Casey that you've been waiting for them to ask for — without making them ask. Do it this week.

cards.title: The Showing Up Card
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: The path forward passes through what stands in the way.
easy.title: The Quiet Calibrator of Argyra

medium.line: No unobserved fire yields
medium.title: The Quiet Pressure of Argyra

hard.line: The crossing happens inside what cannot be avoided.
hard.title: The Unyielding Vector of Argyra

prompts.easy: Name one thing Casey needs from you that you haven't been giving — and do it this week.
prompts.medium: Tell Casey specifically how their showing up has affected you — name the moment, the impact, and do it today.
prompts.hard: Show up for Casey this week the way Casey shows up for everyone else — pick one specific thing and do it without being asked.

cards.title: The Commitment
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Being seen and being loved rise together.
easy.title: The Iron Ward of Argyra

medium.line: Love meets what stands without disguise.
medium.title: The Unmoving Edge of Argyra

hard.line: The heart receives love when nothing remains hidden.
hard.title: The Blazing Oath of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: Name one small, repeatable thing you'll do to stay connected to Casey.
prompts.medium: Make one specific commitment about how you'll show up in the next 30 days.
prompts.hard: What's one habit you're willing to build because Casey matters to you?

cards.title: The Seeing Card
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Every reflection returns to the one who looks.
easy.title: The Breaking Flame of Pyrakanth

medium.line: The mirror answers with the same force brought to it.
medium.title: The Truth Seer of Pyrakanth

hard.line: The face encountered carries something of the self.
hard.title: The Held Flame of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: Tell Casey one thing you see in them that they might not see in themselves — today.
prompts.medium: Name a strength Casey has been undervaluing and do something this week that reflects it back to them.
prompts.hard: Do something for Casey this week that only makes sense if you've been paying close attention — something at the edge of what you'd normally offer.

cards.title: The Schedule
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: A day exists only when a hand claims it.
easy.title: The Ember Diver of Pyrakanth

medium.line: Someday ends the moment a date is spoken.
medium.title: The Whispering Spark of Pyrakanth

prompts.easy: Pick a date and propose something specific to do with Casey.
prompts.medium: Plan something for Casey that requires you to know what they actually like.
prompts.hard: Schedule something for Casey that requires you to initiate, plan, and follow through without them managing any of it.

cards.title: The Check-In
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Every place carries the same self within it.
easy.title: The Ashen Voice of Pyrakanth

medium.line: No distance leaves the self behind.
medium.title: The Open Tide of Lamenth

hard.line: The heart arrives wherever the body goes.
hard.title: The Sorrow Mirror of Lamenth

prompts.easy: Send Casey a message that isn't a question and isn't about you.
prompts.medium: Check in on Casey about something specific they mentioned last time you talked.
prompts.hard: Reach out to Casey about something they're going through that they didn't bring up — because you noticed.

cards.title: The Repair Attempt
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Courage speaks the thought before approval can catch up
easy.title: The Lingering Echo of Lamenth

medium.line: A thought becomes real the moment a voice risks it.
medium.title: The Gentle Current of Lamenth

hard.line: The heart stands when the voice refuses to stay hidden.
hard.title: The Quiet Basin of Lamenth

prompts.easy: Do one thing for Casey this week that requires you to be present, not just helpful.
prompts.medium: Show up for Casey in a way that asks something of you emotionally — not just practically — and do it before the week is out.
prompts.hard: Do the thing for Casey that you've been avoiding because it would require you to be fully seen — and do it this week.

cards.title: The Pour
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: The step toward it is answered by a step back.
easy.title: The Deep Shelter of Lamenth

medium.line: The fire you follow warms you.
medium.title: The Returning Tide of Lamenth

hard.line: The heart reaches and finds something already reaching.
hard.title: The Drowned Path of Lamenth

prompts.easy: Do one thing for Casey this month that costs you something — time, energy, or effort you don't easily have.
prompts.medium: Show up for Casey in a way that requires you to give more than is comfortable — and do it before the week is out.
prompts.hard: Do the most generous thing you can think of for Casey — the one that costs you something real — and do it this week.

cards.title: The Reciprocity Card
cards.image_prompt: Two figures on warm cream background. No faces, no text, no shading. Expressive body language. Portrait card art. Both figures engaged in a small shared activity, close together, moving in the same direction.

easy.line: Beauty and terror arrive together; both must be received.
easy.title: The Quiet Ground of Meridia

medium.line: Nothing is refused; all is faced.
medium.title: The Living Wall of Meridia

hard.line: The self must hold what arrives without sorting.
hard.title: The Open Field of Meridia

prompts.easy: Do one thing for Casey this week that reflects who you've become in this friendship — not who you were when it started.
prompts.medium: Name something Casey has given you repeatedly — then give it back before the week is out.
prompts.hard: Do something for Casey this week that could only come from someone who has known them the way you have — the act that only you could give.
